Here are some things that slu's do and ask themselves to harness the power of unity. First, slu's of influence leverage the principle of unity by pointing to commonalities that foster wee mindsets. To do so, they do their homework and research what kinds of things can be brought to top of mind that will make feelings of unity more likely, such as commonalities of place. Second, slu's invest in creating those mindsets by engaging in synchronization of activities or through acts of co-creation. Next, they highlight the length of time they've been close to others to make real, mutual feelings of weeness more prominent. Lastly, slu's also avoid unethical behavior by making sure that cues of unity are naturally present and true. They know that doing otherwise would damage the closeness of relationships and result in fewer opportunities to interact with people and build relationships. Now the main questions that slu's should ask themselves when seeking to use unity to influence others are first, have I done my homework to uncover and then highlight cues of weeness between myself and those I am trying to influence, such as pointing to existing close relationships or commonalities of place. Second, can I arrange for us to work together in a synchronous fashion or to engage in co-creation? Third, have I thought to begin a request to someone I've had a close relationship with by remarking on how long we've been in that relationship. And finally, have I made certain that any efforts I make to employ cues of unity are based on genuinely present features of that situation.
